option_line: sdtu_umbraTrickVIPhelped:"Trust me. I've helped the ARC before, just ask Imoinu."
original: Trust me. I've helped the ARC before, just ask Imoinu.

option_line: sdtu_umbraTrickVIPD:"Une cellule ARC clandestine dont vous n'avez jamais entendu parler." (mensonge)
original: Une cellule ARC clandestine dont vous n'avez jamais entendu parler." (mensonge)

option_line: sdtu_umbraTrickVIPE:"Je suis de la foi luddique et je combats notre ennemi commun." (lie)
original: Je suis de la foi luddique et je combats notre ennemi commun." (lie)

option_line: sdtu_umbraTrickVIPF:"Je suis de la foi luddique et je combats notre ennemi commun."
original: Je suis de la foi luddique et je combats notre ennemi commun.

option_line: sdtu_umbraTrickVIPG:"Renseignements de la flotte de la Ligue Persane. Mon vrai nom est 'Siyavong'." (mensonge)
original: Renseignements de la flotte de la Ligue Persane. Mon vrai nom est 'Siyavong'." (mensonge)

"I will," $heOrShe says, then mutes the feed for a moment, turning to a secondary display.

You watch one side of a short conversation play out, and $heOrShe turns back to you, $hisOrHer expression much friendlier.

"I'm sorry for that, captain. Imoinu swears you're a friend of the United Front of the Askonian Resistance who has made valuable material contributions to the cause." $HeOrShe nods respectfully, "Then let me say that I'm proud to call you a comrade."

option_line: sdtu_umbraTrickVIPending1:"Glad to hear it. Now about this agent..."
original: Glad to hear it. Now about this agent...
